notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza steals (4) 3rd base. Vaughn Grissom to 2nd. Passed ball by catcher Carter Jensen. Vaughn Grissom to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Zach Neto. Isaac Collins scores. Michael Massey scores. Nick Loftin to 2nd. Fielding error by shortstop Zach Neto. Throwing error by shortstop Zach Neto.

notableEvents.label: Salvador Perez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Salvador Perez grounds into a double play, second baseman Vaughn Grissom to shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Vinnie Pasquantino out at 2nd. Salvador Perez out at 1st.
